enclosure_design.construction: CNC-machined one-piece tub plus removable flat lid
enclosure_design.datum: lower-left corner of the unobstructed inner floor envelope; +x east, +y north, +z toward lid
enclosure_design.finish: bare machined aluminum, deburred and solvent-cleaned; no anodize, paint, conversion coating, gasket, or insulating film on body, lid, fastener seats, or seam

lid_fasteners.body_thread: M3x0.5-6H blind tapped 5.0 mm minimum full thread depth
lid_fasteners.part: ISO 4762 M3x0.5x8 A2-70 stainless socket-head cap screw

enclosure_design.lid_seam: continuous bare-metal 8.0 mm perimeter land; dry assembly with no gasket
enclosure_design.material: ASTM B209 6061-T6 aluminum plate or billet with lot and mill-certificate custody
mechanical_acceptance: material, heat treatment, lot, mill certificate, body identity, and lid identity match the reviewed receipt
the full 124.0x82.0x36.0 mm inner gauge envelope enters without interference at every mount and fastener location
body, lid, wall, floor, panel throat, holes, counterbores, blind threads, mount origins, and retention parts pass the stated tolerances
all edges are deburred 0.2 to 0.5 mm and every machined surface is clean and free of conductive debris
all ten lid screws are present at 0.45 plus or minus 0.05 N m and the dry perimeter seam has no visible gap
body-to-lid continuity and all isolated bulkhead/star-to-body resistance checks meet the electrical acceptance thresholds
every PEEK standoff, washer, board screw, tray, tray screw, blind floor thread, and lid screw matches the exact non-purchasing BOM identity and quantity
all three Nucleo trays pass every tray-specific dimensional, insertion, retention, keepout, flush-head, and visual acceptance requirement
enclosure_design.panel_land: every vertical-panel through-hole is exterior-counterbored 5.0 mm deep, leaving an exact 3.0 mm inner throat

retention_systems.board_fastener: ISO 4762 M3x0.5x6 A2-70 plus 0.5 mm PEEK flat washer
retention_systems.floor_interface: M3x0.5 blind tapped 4.0 mm into the 5.0 mm floor, leaving at least 1.0 mm exterior floor
retention_systems.geometry: 6.0 mm hex body; M3x0.5 male floor stud 4.0 mm; M3x0.5 female top thread 6.0 mm; body length equals mount standoff_mm
retention_systems.material: unfilled natural PEEK conforming to ASTM D6262 S-PAEK

retention_systems.board_fastener: ISO 4762 M2.5x0.45x5 A2-70 plus 0.5 mm PEEK flat washer
retention_systems.floor_interface: M2.5x0.45 blind tapped 4.0 mm into the 5.0 mm floor, leaving at least 1.0 mm exterior floor
retention_systems.geometry: 5.0 mm hex body; M2.5x0.45 male floor stud 4.0 mm; M2.5x0.45 female top thread 5.0 mm; body length equals mount standoff_mm
retention_systems.material: unfilled natural PEEK conforming to ASTM D6262 S-PAEK

retention_systems.assembly_method: with power and all external cables absent, align the board over all four integral lead-in ramps and apply no more than 10.0 N total downward force distributed only across the outermost 1.0 mm PCB perimeter until all clips seat; the ramps may deflect each clip outward no more than 0.50 mm; no separate jig, pry tool, header, connector, component, pad, or test point may carry insertion force

board_admission_outline_mm.law: measure the bare PCB edge outline before insertion; reject any board outside both closed intervals

board_seat.cut: no pocket; flat continuous seat except flush PEEK anchor heads
board_seat.datum: tray lower-left top face with components toward +z

retention_systems.floor_fastener: P0-PEEK-CSK-M2X0P4X6-REV-A, unfilled natural PEEK, 90 degree countersunk head 4.0 mm maximum diameter; M2x0.4 male thread; four per tray into M2x0.4-6H blind floor holes 4.0 mm deep with at least 3.0 mm engagement and 1.0 mm exterior floor remaining
retention_systems.keepout: clips contact only the outermost 1.0 mm board perimeter and do not cover connectors, headers, components, pads, test points, or copper beyond that perimeter
retention_systems.material: unfilled natural PEEK conforming to ASTM D6262 S-PAEK
retention_acceptance: the measured bare-PCB edge outline passes board_admission_outline_mm before insertion
all four PEEK anchor heads are flush to 0.05 mm below the seat and no metal is exposed beneath the board
board insertion requires no more than 0.50 mm outward clip deflection and leaves no crack, craze, chip, permanent set, or board witness mark
after insertion the board moves no more than 0.20 mm laterally under 2.0 N in either tray axis
the retained board withstands 5.0 N upward for 10 seconds without release, damage, connector/header contact, or permanent displacement
all four contact rectangles remain within the admitted board outline and every clip contact and keepout condition passes visual inspection at 10x

mounts.origin_datum: board-local lower-left underside [0,0,0] at the tray seat
mounts.rotation_convention: counterclockwise from machine +x toward machine +y when viewed from +z toward the floor
